remarks: Highest and Best Monday 7/13 at Noon.... Welcome to one of the most pristine end units in this highly desirable complexes in Stamford. Just a short walk to the beach, this beautifully updated townhome offers the perfect blend of style, comfort, and convenience, complete with a community pool and clubhouse. Thoughtfully remodeled over the past several years, the home features a stunning kitchen with custom cabinetry, granite countertops, and quality finishes throughout. Additional upgrades include custom built-ins, custom banisters and railings, and a beautiful shiplap accent wall leading upstairs. Recessed lighting enhances the home's bright, inviting feel, while hardwood floors throughout the main and upper levels and durable luxury vinyl flooring in the finished lower level provide both style and functionality. The spacious living room opens through sliders to a private deck, providing with privacy with no direct neighbors behind you most days. Upstairs are two oversized bedrooms with abundant closet space and an updated full bath, while the main level offers an updated half bath. The finished lower level provides flexible space for a family room, home office, gym, or playroom. Additional highlights include newer central air conditioning, a newer hot water heater, and a dedicated parking space directly next to the unit. Meticulously maintained and completely move-in ready, this home offers carefree living in one of the area's most sought-after beach communitie
